calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for Petitioner Angela Alme

The Court asked Ms. Hinshaw to address the issue of an improper preliminary distribution which had been made. Ms. Hinshaw admitted that a mistake had been made in the timing by making the distribution 15 days before the 65th day, but explained that since the mom is the beneficiary of the father's estate, no one was harmed in the making of the distribution. She stated that the estate was insolvent to begin with, but that they had been able to obtain funding to pay off the creditors and taxes. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
